name: orca
description: Standalone Orca orchestration bundle. Skill `orca-workers` — coordinate parallel sub-worktree workers for one feature/page cycle (provision → brief → supervised dispatch → cross-model Codex review → fix loop → integration landing). Bundles the official `orca-cli`, `orchestration` & `computer-use` skills (vendored verbatim from stablyai/orca, MIT — see NOTICE.md) so it needs no locally-installed Orca skills.
